stemHtml: A pilot needs to announce the wake turbulence category to the ATS unit…

options.a: When flying in congested airspace where separation is critical, all aircraft must append the wake turbulence to their call sign.
options.b: Only upon first contact of an approach, departure or tower frequency, if the aircraft belongs to the category 'heavy' or 'super'.
options.c: If the actual TOM of the aircraft exceeds 7000 kg, upon every initial call on a new frequency.
options.d: If the MTOM exceeds 136 000 kg, upon every initial call on a new frequency.
